content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "曾經去過的地方，不如再去一次？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你曾經去過淡水嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ céngjīng qù guò Dànshuǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ceng2jing1 qu4 guo4 Dan4shui3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you ever been to Tamsui?",
          "translation_ko": "단수이에 가본 적이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有啊，我去年去過一次。風景很漂亮。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu a, wǒ qùnián qù guò yī cì. Fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 a, wo3 qu4nian2 qu4 guo4 yi1 ci4. Feng1jing3 hen3 piao4liang.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I went once last year. The scenery was very beautiful.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 작년에 한 번 갔었어요. 풍경이 아름다웠어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你覺得再去一次怎麼樣？不如我們這個週末一起去。",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ juéde zài qù yī cì zěnme yàng? Bùrú wǒmen zhège zhōumò yīqǐ qù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 jue2de zai4 qu4 yi1 ci4 zen3me yang4? Bu4ru2 wo3men zhe4ge zhou1mo4 yi1qi3 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Then how about going again? Why don't we go together this weekend?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 다시 한 번 가는 게 어때요? 이번 주말에 같이 가는 게 낫겠어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！我曾經吃過那裡的阿給，很好吃。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Wǒ céngjīng chī guò nàlǐ de āgěi, hěn hǎochī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a! Wo3 ceng2jing1 chi1 guo4 na4li3 de a1gei3, hen3 hao3chi1.",
          "translation_en": "Great! I've had the a-gei there before; it's delicious.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 거기서 아까이를 먹어본 적이 있는데, 정말 맛있었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那我們可以再去吃一次，順便看夕陽。",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒmen kěyǐ zài qù chī yī cì, shùnbiàn kàn xīyáng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3men ke3yi3 zai4 qu4 chi1 yi1 ci4, shun4bian4 kan4 xi1yang2.",
          "translation_en": "Then we can go eat it again and watch the sunset while we're at it.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 다시 먹으러 가면서 석양도 보면 좋겠네요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，就這麼決定！我現在正在看天氣，希望是晴天。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, jiù zhème juédìng! Wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kàn tiānqì, xīwàng shì qíngtiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, jiu4 zhe4me jue2ding4! Wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kan4 tian1qi4, xi1wang4 shi4 qing2tian1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, it's settled! I'm checking the weather now; I hope it's sunny.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그렇게 정해요! 지금 날씨를 보고 있는데, 맑았으면 좋겠네요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where did speaker B go last year?",
          "question_ko": "화자 B는 작년에 어디에 갔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Tamsui", "Taipei", "Kaohsiung"],
          "options_ko": ["단수이", "타이베이", "가오슝"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '曾經' and '正在'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a story about a place you have visited before and suggest going there again."
    },
    {
      "title": "你能夠幫我修理手機嗎？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我的手機壞了，你能夠幫我修理嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ de shǒujī huài le, nǐ nénggòu bāng wǒ xiūlǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 de shou3ji1 huai4 le, ni3 neng2gou4 bang1 wo3 xiu1li3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "My phone is broken; can you help me fix it?",
          "translation_ko": "제 휴대폰이 고장 났는데, 고치는 걸 도와주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我曾經修過手機，但是不太會修理新的型號。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ céngjīng xiū guò shǒujī, dànshì bù tài huì xiūlǐ xīn de xínghào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ceng2jing1 xiu1 guo4 shou3ji1, dan4shi4 bu4 tai4 hui4 xiu1li3 xin1 de xing2hao4.",
          "translation_en": "I've fixed phones before, but I'm not very good at repairing new models.",
          "translation_ko": "예전에 휴대폰을 수리해 본 적은 있지만, 새 모델은 잘 못 고쳐요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係，你先幫我看一下，能不能修。",
          "pinyin": "Méiguānxi, nǐ xiān bāng wǒ kàn yīxià, néng bù néng xiū.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2guan1xi4, ni3 xian1 bang1 wo3 kan4 yi1xia4, neng2 bu4 neng2 xiu1.",
          "translation_en": "It's okay; first take a look for me and see if it can be fixed.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 먼저 한번 봐 주세요, 고칠 수 있는지."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，我試試看。你正在用這支手機做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ shì shì kàn. Nǐ zhèngzài yòng zhè zhī shǒujī zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 shi4 shi4 kan4. Ni3 zheng4zai4 yong4 zhe4 zhi1 shou3ji1 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, let me try. What were you doing with this phone?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 한번 해볼게요. 이 휴대폰으로 무엇을 하고 계셨나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我剛才正在看影片，然後螢幕就黑了。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ gāngcái zhèngzài kàn yǐngpiàn, ránhòu yíngmù jiù hēi le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 gang1cai2 zheng4zai4 kan4 ying3pian4, ran2hou4 ying2mu4 jiu4 hei1 le.",
          "translation_en": "I was just watching a video, and then the screen went black.",
          "translation_ko": "방금 영상을 보고 있었는데, 화면이 꺼졌어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "可能是電池的問題。我能夠幫你換電池，但是需要時間。",
          "pinyin": "Kěnéng shì diànchí de wèntí. Wǒ nénggòu bāng nǐ huàn diànchí, dànshì xūyào shíjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3neng2 shi4 dian4chi2 de wen4ti2. Wo3 neng2gou4 bang1 ni3 huan4 dian4chi2, dan4shi4 xu1yao4 shi2jian1.",
          "translation_en": "It might be a battery issue. I can help you replace the battery, but it will take time.",
          "translation_ko": "배터리 문제인 것 같아요. 배터리를 교체해 드릴 수는 있지만, 시간이 필요해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒問題，你慢慢修。我打算明天再來拿。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, nǐ màn man xiū. Wǒ dǎsuàn míngtiān zài lái ná.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, ni3 man4 man xiu1. Wo3 da3suan4 ming2tian1 zai4 lai2 na2.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, take your time fixing it. I plan to come pick it up tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 천천히 고치세요. 내일 다시 찾으러 올게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the problem with the phone?",
          "question_ko": "휴대폰에 무슨 문제가 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The screen is black", "The battery is dead", "The speaker is broken"],
          "options_ko": ["화면이 꺼졌다", "배터리가 방전되었다", "스피커가 고장 났다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to the use of '能夠' and '正在'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Describe a time when you needed help fixing something and what you planned to do."
    },
    {
      "title": "比較一下，哪一個比較好？",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我想買一個新手機，但是不知道要選哪一個。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī gè xīn shǒujī, dànshì bù zhīdào yào xuǎn nǎ yī gè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 mai3 yi1 ge4 xin1 shou3ji1, dan4shi4 bu4 zhi1dao4 yao4 xuan3 na3 yi1 ge4.",
          "translation_en": "I want to buy a new phone, but I don't know which one to choose.",
          "translation_ko": "새 휴대폰을 사고 싶은데, 어떤 걸 골라야 할지 모르겠어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你可以比較這兩支手機的價錢和功能。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ kěyǐ bǐjiào zhè liǎng zhī shǒujī de jiàqián hé gōngnéng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ke3yi3 bi3jiao4 zhe4 liang3 zhi1 shou3ji1 de jia4qian2 he2 gong1neng2.",
          "translation_en": "You can compare the price and features of these two phones.",
          "translation_ko": "이 두 휴대폰의 가격과 기능을 비교해 보세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這一支比較便宜，但是那一支的相機比較好。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè yī zhī bǐjiào piányi, dànshì nà yī zhī de xiàngjī bǐjiào hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 yi1 zhi1 bi3jiao4 pian2yi4, dan4shi4 na4 yi1 zhi1 de xiang4ji1 bi3jiao4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "This one is cheaper, but that one has a better camera.",
          "translation_ko": "이쪽이 더 싸지만, 저쪽이 카메라가 더 좋아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "那你覺得哪一個比較重要？價錢還是相機？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ juéde nǎ yī gè bǐjiào zhòngyào? Jiàqián háishì xiàngjī?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 jue2de na3 yi1 ge4 bi3jiao4 zhong4yao4? Jia4qian2 hai2shi4 xiang4ji1?",
          "translation_en": "Then which do you think is more important? Price or camera?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 어떤 게 더 중요하다고 생각하세요? 가격인가요, 카메라인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我比較喜歡拍照，所以相機好一點比較重要。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān pāizhào, suǒyǐ xiàngjī hǎo yīdiǎn bǐjiào zhòngyào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 pai1zhao4, suo3yi3 xiang4ji1 hao3 yi1dian3 bi3jiao4 zhong4yao4.",
          "translation_en": "I prefer taking photos, so a better camera is more important.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 사진 찍는 걸 더 좋아해서, 카메라가 조금 더 나은 게 더 중요해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "那不如選相機比較好的那一支，雖然比較貴。",
          "pinyin": "Nà bùrú xuǎn xiàngjī bǐjiào hǎo de nà yī zhī, suīrán bǐjiào guì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 bu4ru2 xuan3 xiang4ji1 bi3jiao4 hao3 de na4 yi1 zhi1, sui1ran2 bi3jiao4 gui4.",
          "translation_en": "Then why not choose the one with the better camera, even though it's more expensive.",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 카메라가 더 좋은 쪽을 고르는 게 낫겠네요, 비싸긴 하지만요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好，我就買這一支。謝謝你的建議！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ jiù mǎi zhè yī zhī. Xièxiè nǐ de jiànyì!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 jiu4 mai3 zhe4 yi1 zhi1. Xie4xie4 ni3 de jian4yi4!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll buy this one. Thanks for your advice!",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 이걸로 살게요. 조언 감사합니다!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Which phone did speaker A decide to buy?",
          "question_ko": "화자 A는 어떤 휴대폰을 사기로 결정했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The cheaper one", "The one with the better camera", "The newest one"],
          "options_ko": ["더 싼 것", "카메라가 더 좋은 것", "가장 새로운 것"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on the comparative structure '比較' and the suggestion '不如'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Compare two items you are considering buying and explain your choice."
    }
  ]
}
